posts.author: MACROFIBRE
posts.text: Lot of abbreviations here @kenshin Whats DC and QC? Data Centre and Quantum compute? I bought some Broadcom and Qualcomm since i believe edge computing is going to be the next big thing in the future. Broadcom is on a tear any given day with volumes up there with QQQ. Qualcomm on the other hand has been a laggard and is negative for the year. Don’t understand why the market does not love it
